examples: Her eyes were a bright, cornflower blue.
As tall as Jack, Hensley was thinner, more compact under a perfectly tailored suit and white Egyptian cotton shirt, a tie of cornflower blue.
She placed a square of cornflower-lacquered MDF on top of the walnut.
Under a cornflower sky, up through the gears, and Italy fell away around us.
The ballerina Cynthia Gregory, for instance, had a Delphos in cornflower blue.
